content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
• 428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
Alex Olvera 
Division Manager 
Los Angeles County 
Registrar-Recorder/County Clerk 
12400 Imperial Highway 
Norwalk, CA 90650 
June 12, 2017 
Re: 
Your Request for lnfonnal Assistance 
Our File No. \V-17-109 
Dear Mr. Olvera: 
This letter confirms your withdrawal of your request for fonnal written advice regarding the 
campaign provisions of the Political Refonn Act. Please feel free to contact the Fair Political 
Practices Commission for advice if another question arises under the Act. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
By: 
MFC:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Hyla P. Wagner 
General Counsel 
Matthew F. hrist
 
Counsel, Legal Division

sections.question_synthetic: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal letter confirming the withdrawal of a prior request for formal written advice regarding campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC confirms the requestor's withdrawal of their request for formal written advice on Political Reform Act campaign provisions.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no substantive QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms withdrawal of prior advice request. File number W-17-109 indicates withdrawal status.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal letter confirming the withdrawal of a prior request for formal written advice regarding campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC confirms the requestor's withdrawal of their request for formal written advice on Political Reform Act campaign provisions.
